description_long: This is a military-style airplane with a long, slender fuselage and a matte olive-green finish, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The wings are mounted low on the fuselage and are straight with a slight anhedral angle, featuring prominent landing gear extending downward. The tail section is distinctive, with a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer forming a T-tail configuration and a single vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a small, angular canopy. The airplane has a single jet engine intake at the rear, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal surface ornamentation and a focus on aerodynamic efficiency.
description: A matte olive-green military-style airplane with a long fuselage, low straight wings, and a T-tail. It features an enclosed forward cockpit and prominent landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long fuselage, low-mounted straight wings, and T-tail configuration.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow fuselage, landing gear, and the cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the T-tail and wing structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, T-tail, and the placement of the landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and a slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with an angular canopy.
